payload.purpose_context: Mission #2684 evicted work-package runtime state into the append-only event log but shipped it as dual-write behind an off-by-default flag, so production still treats the legacy WP files as authority. This mission runs the deferred corpus cutover — a fail-closed backfill-and-verify migration, an unconditional flag flip, and removal of the legacy fallbacks — so that stopping WP-file runtime writes becomes the real production behaviour and existing deployments migrate safely on upgrade.
payload.purpose_tldr: Make the event log the unconditional authority for work-package runtime state and retire the dual-write phase-1 toggle via a fail-closed corpus migration.

payload.wp_title: SaaS fan-out of the resolved binding
Snapshot done-evidence + delete fallbacks + route bypass readers
Unconditional reader/writer cutover (flip flag, delete predicate)
Subtask completion event-sourced; markdown checkboxes removed
Execute dogfood corpus backfill + commit seeds (BLOCKER-fix)
